A taste of real Mexico

Twenty years of flavor,
one little truck.

“I've worked in Mexican food for over 20 years. I finally started my own — and with my wife, my kids, and our amazing customers, Don Chente became what it is today.”

Every taco is built on a hand-pressed flour tortilla, filled with freshly cooked meats and topped with our signature red salsa. It's the kind of breakfast and lunch that keeps Canyon Lake coming back, morning after morning.

View Full Menu (830) 302-9124

Our Menu

Fresh off the comal

Prices are representative — please call (830) 302-9124 to confirm today's prices & specials.

Breakfast Favorites

Served Mon–Sat from 7:00 AM

Bacon & Egg Taco$2.75Crispy bacon and scrambled egg on a homemade flour tortilla.
Chorizo & Egg Taco$2.75House chorizo scrambled with egg and a touch of red salsa.
Potato & Egg Taco$2.50Golden potato, egg and melted cheese — a morning classic.
Barbacoa Taco$3.25Slow-cooked, tender barbacoa with onion and cilantro.
Breakfast Burrito$8.50Egg, cheese & your choice of meat wrapped in a big flour tortilla.

Tacos & Plates

Lunch favorites served until 1:00 PM

Don Chente Taco House favorite$4.25Carne asada, bacon, white cheese & jalapeños — the one everyone orders.
Carne Asada Taco$3.50Grilled steak, onion, cilantro and a squeeze of lime.
Al Pastor Taco$3.25Marinated pork with a hint of pineapple sweetness.
Carne Guisada Taco$3.50Slow-stewed beef in rich gravy — watch the spicy jalapeños!
Carne Asada Burrito$9.50A standout — perfectly toasted flour tortilla, loaded.
Torta / Quesadilla / Chalupa$8.00+Hearty Mexican classics, made the traditional way.
Our promise
“It truly brightens my day to see my customers smile every morning — and to build real friendships, one taco at a time.
Fernando Guzman
Owner & Head Cook
